features_analyzed.feature_name: Task Flow Substrate with Durable State Tracking
openclaw_references: Managed vs mirrored sync mode logic

gap_analysis.what_we_have: Basic task tracking in cron_service.py and heartbeat_service.py
gap_analysis.what_this_adds: Durable flow state with revision tracking, managed child task spawning, cancel intent propagation, and inspection/recovery primitives

implementation_notes: Create TaskFlowManager in src/universal_agent/durable/task_flow.py
Implement two sync modes: Managed (persisted in SQLite/Postgres with revision tracking) and Mirrored (ephemeral, mirrors parent state)
Add sticky cancel intent: cancel_intent flag stops new child spawning but allows active children to complete
Create inspection API endpoint: GET /api/v1/flows with filtering by status/owner
Add recovery primitive: POST /api/v1/flows/{flow_id}/recover
Store flow state in database with schema: id, parent_id, owner_type, owner_id, state (JSONB), revision, sync_mode, cancel_intent, timestamps
features_analyzed.rationale: Critical for VP orchestration reliability. Current cron-based orchestration lacks state tracking and recovery.

gap_analysis.what_we_have: Flat .env configuration and hardcoded tool paths
gap_analysis.what_this_adds: Namespaced plugin config with ownership boundaries, automatic migration support

implementation_notes: Define PluginConfig class in src/universal_agent/tools/plugin_config.py with namespace-based config loading
Create config migration tool: python -m src.universal_agent.tools.migrate_config
Update existing tools to use PluginConfig (x_search, web_fetch)
Add validation in gateway.py startup to warn on legacy config keys
features_analyzed.rationale: Foundation for plugin ecosystem. Avoid technical debt by adopting namespacing early.

gap_analysis.what_we_have: Basic context management, unclear if we have compaction
gap_analysis.what_this_adds: Configurable model for compaction (cheaper/faster model), opt-in user notification

implementation_notes: Add config key: AGENT_DEFAULTS_COMPACTION_MODEL=claude-3-haiku
Add config key: AGENT_DEFAULTS_COMPACTION_NOTIFY_USER=true
Implement compact_context() method in agent_core.py with model selection
Wire into context length monitoring
features_analyzed.rationale: Cost optimization - use cheaper model for summarization during context compaction.

gap_analysis.what_this_adds: Role-based scoping for subagent operations, preventing privilege escalation

implementation_notes: Define scopes in src/universal_agent/auth/scopes.py (AGENT, OPERATOR_ADMIN)
Add scope checks in delegation/delegator.py spawn_subagent()
Audit VP tools in src/universal_agent/vp/ for admin-only operations
features_analyzed.rationale: Security critical - prevent privilege escalation in subagent operations.

gap_analysis.what_we_have: Basic cron execution with all tools available
gap_analysis.what_this_adds: Restrictive tool allowlist per cron job for security

implementation_notes: Extend CronJob schema with tools_allowlist: Optional[List[str]]
Add get_tools_for_execution() method to filter tools based on allowlist
Update API endpoint: POST /api/v1/cron accepts tools_allowlist field
Update Web UI cron job editor to support tool selection
features_analyzed.rationale: Security best practice - limit tool access for scheduled jobs.

gap_analysis.what_we_have: Session management but unclear auth requirements
gap_analysis.what_this_adds: Explicit scope check before session existence probe

implementation_notes: Add @require_scope decorator in gateway.py
Enforce OPERATOR_ADMIN scope on DELETE /api/v1/sessions/{session_id}
Prevent unauthenticated callers from probing session existence
features_analyzed.rationale: Security critical - prevent unauthorized session probing and termination.

gap_analysis.what_this_adds: Pre-reply hook to intercept/synthesize agent responses

implementation_notes: Add BEFORE_AGENT_REPLY to HookType enum in hooks.py
Allow hook to return synthetic reply to skip LLM call
Use cases: caching, rate limiting, quick responses for simple queries
features_analyzed.rationale: Performance optimization - enables response caching and synthetic replies.

gap_analysis.what_this_adds: Provider-specific hooks for transcript handling and replay customization

implementation_notes: Define provider hook interface in agent_core.py
Allow providers to customize transcript compaction policy, replay cleanup logic, reasoning mode dispatch
features_analyzed.rationale: Provider flexibility - enables provider-specific optimizations.

gap_analysis.what_we_have: Telegram mentions but unclear Matrix support
gap_analysis.what_this_adds: Standardized mention metadata for Matrix clients

implementation_notes: If adding Matrix support, ensure m.mentions is included in message events
Apply similar pattern to Telegram mentions
features_analyzed.rationale: Channel-specific - only relevant if we add Matrix support.

gap_analysis.what_this_adds: Cooldown-based suppression to prevent spam

implementation_notes: Add ErrorSuppressor class in telegram_bot.py with cooldown tracking
Make cooldown configurable per account/chat
Implement should_suppress() method with time-based deduplication
features_analyzed.rationale: Reliability improvement - prevents error spam in Telegram channels.

gap_analysis.what_this_adds: Strip internal monologue tags before user delivery

implementation_notes: Add sanitize_output() function in response processing
Strip <antml:thinking> blocks with regex
Apply before returning response to user
features_analyzed.rationale: Polish - prevents internal thinking blocks from leaking to users.

gap_analysis.what_this_adds: Automatic approval channel inference from owner config

implementation_notes: In exec tool approval flow, check channel config for approver hints
Auto-route approval requests to DM if single approver inferred
Keep fanout explicit for multi-approver scenarios
features_analyzed.rationale: UX improvement - reduces friction in approval workflows.

gap_analysis.what_this_adds: Graceful handling of transient disconnections

implementation_notes: Implement reconnect grace period for ACP prompts
Reject stale prompts after grace expiry
Add bounded failure handling
features_analyzed.rationale: Reliability - improves resilience under network issues.

gap_analysis.what_this_adds: Prevent bypass of configured sandbox/host target

implementation_notes: If we implement exec tool, ensure host routing is configuration-driven
Reject runtime overrides that bypass security policy
features_analyzed.rationale: Security - prevents configuration bypass in exec tool.

gap_analysis.what_this_adds: Surface timeout failures even in non-verbose mode

implementation_notes: Ensure timeout failures are logged/surfaced regardless of verbose setting
Include in cron job status reporting
features_analyzed.rationale: Reliability - prevents silent cron failures.

gap_analysis.what_this_adds: Configurable chat history truncation

implementation_notes: Assess need for webchat feature
Implement history truncation if webchat is prioritized
features_analyzed.rationale: Only relevant if we implement webchat interface.

gap_analysis.what_this_adds: Permissive defaults for trusted automation

implementation_notes: Evaluate security tradeoffs
Consider for trusted automation contexts
features_analyzed.rationale: Evaluate if our use case benefits from permissive defaults vs explicit approval flows.

gap_analysis.what_this_adds: Alternative search backend with self-hosting option

implementation_notes: Evaluate SearXNG as search backend alternative
Test performance and reliability
features_analyzed.rationale: Consider as alternative if current search provider has issues.

gap_analysis.what_this_adds: Android Assistant trigger integration

features_analyzed.rationale: Platform-specific to Android, not applicable to our Python backend.

gap_analysis.what_this_adds: Guardrails support for Bedrock provider

features_analyzed.rationale: Only relevant if we use Amazon Bedrock.

gap_analysis.what_this_adds: Reaction level guidance for WhatsApp

features_analyzed.rationale: Platform-specific, we use Telegram.

gap_analysis.what_this_adds: Voice wake trigger for Talk Mode

features_analyzed.rationale: Platform-specific to macOS.

gap_analysis.what_this_adds: Tool payload normalization for Kimi Coding

features_analyzed.rationale: Specific to Kimi Coding provider, unlikely we'll use it.

gap_analysis.what_this_adds: Isolation of inspection helpers from runtime

features_analyzed.rationale: Optimization specific to OpenClaw's browser plugin architecture.

tasks: Implement scope checks in delegation layer
Audit VP tools for admin operations
Enforce OPERATOR_ADMIN scope on session kill endpoint
Update Web UI for tool selection
Add inspection and recovery API endpoints
Create database schema for flow state
Create migration tool for legacy config
Update existing tools to use namespaced config
Implement context compaction with model selection

architectural_insights.observation: OpenClaw is moving toward strict plugin ownership boundaries with plugins owning their configuration namespaces and legacy paths being migrated automatically.
architectural_insights.implication: We should adopt similar namespacing early to avoid technical debt. The PluginConfig pattern is lightweight and extensible.

architectural_insights.observation: The Task Flow substrate introduces durable orchestration with managed state, revision tracking for recovery, sticky cancel intent, and inspection primitives.
architectural_insights.implication: Critical for VP orchestration reliability. Current cron-based orchestration lacks state tracking and recovery.

architectural_insights.observation: OpenClaw is enforcing consistent scope checks across all runtime boundaries including subagent operations, session management, and exec routing.
architectural_insights.implication: We should audit all delegation and session management endpoints for scope enforcement gaps.

architectural_insights.observation: Messaging channels are getting sophisticated error handling with cooldown-based suppression, timeout handling for media, and callback length workarounds.
architectural_insights.implication: Apply similar patterns to our Telegram integration to improve reliability under error conditions.
